'''Rikki Sheriffe''' (born 5 May 1984) is an English former [[rugby league]] footballer who last played for the [[Keighley Cougars]] in [[League 1 (rugby league)|League 1]]. Between 2010 and 2012 he played [[rugby union]] for [[Newcastle Falcons]].

In his earlier rugby league career he played for the [[Bradford Bulls]], [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]], [[York City Knights]], [[London Broncos|Harlequins RL]] and [[Doncaster R.L.F.C.|Doncaster]].

Rikki Sheriffe's usual position is {{rlp|wg}}, or {{rlp|ce}}. Since the start of 2017 Sheriffe is also Keighley's development coach.<ref name=KN131016>{{cite news |url=http://www.keighleynews.co.uk/sport/sportrugbyleague/rugbyleaguecougars/14799972.Welsh_become_Cougars__latest_new_recruit_for_2017_campaign/ |title=Welsh become Cougars' latest new recruit for 2017 campaign |newspaper=Keighley News |date=13 October 2016 |accessdate=9 March 2016}}</ref>

His brother [[Jode Sheriffe]] is a [[Jamaica national rugby league team|Jamaican]] international,<ref>{{cite news |title=Jamaica proud to play |url=http://www.rugbyleague.com/rugby-league-news/jamaica-proud-to-play.html |work=rugbyleague.com |date=12 November 2009 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20111009003516/http://www.rugbyleague.com/rugby-league-news/jamaica-proud-to-play.html |archive-date=9 October 2011}}</ref><ref name="Friday Interview - Rikki Sheriffe: Sheriffe sure Bulls can rally towards play-offs">{{cite web|url=http://www.yorkshirepost.co.uk/rugby-league/Friday-Interview--Rikki-Sheriffe.6410703.jp|title=Friday Interview - Rikki Sheriffe: Sheriffe sure Bulls can rally towards play-offs|work=Yorkshire Post|date=9 July 2010|accessdate=11 August 2010}}</ref> and for two seasons, 2015–16, Rikki, Jodie and their other brother [[Jesse Sheriffe|Jesse]] all played for Keighley.<ref name=KN131016/>

On 24 Oct 2019 it was announced that Sheriffe had retired and taken up a role as Assistant Coach for [[Halifax Panthers]]<ref>{{cite web|website=www.loverugbyleague.com|date=24 Oct 2019|accessdate=7 Jan 2021|title=Rikki Sheriffe appointed Halifax assistant coach|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/rikki-sheriffe-appointed-halifax-assistant-coach/}}</ref>
